value.found_quote:
A fast, read-only agent optimized for searching and analyzing codebases.

    * **Model**: Haiku (fast, low-latency)
    * **Tools**: Read-only tools (denied access to Write and Edit tools)
    * **Purpose**: File discovery, code search, codebase exploration
value.rationale: The page lists Explore as a built-in subagent in Claude Code, describing it as "A fast, read-only agent optimized for searching and analyzing codebases," matching the claim. It is presented as a currently included feature, so active.
